| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.am2rlauncher.config` | `string or absolute path` | Config file for am2rlauncher in XML format. You can see the available options by modifying the settings in the GUI and looking at $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/AM2RLauncher/config.xml. |
| `programs.am2rlauncher.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable am2rlauncher. |
